EmailTemplate.description: Regarding customer cancellation and failure to get in contact.
EmailTemplate.name: Cancellation - No Answer
EmailTemplate.subject: Cancellation of your Policy Renewal
EmailTemplate.textOnly:
Hi {!Contact.FirstName},
Thank you for contacting Kingsbridge.
We have just tried to contact you regarding your request to cancel your business insurance policy.
We would like to discuss what we can do to support you in this instance and explain what the options are for your business insurance.
Please can you contact us on 01242 808740 so we can assist you with your request.
Kind regards,
{!User.FirstName} Customer Accounts Team
E: customersupport@kingsbridge.co.uk T: 01242 808 740
